articles.title: Australia's spinners dominate to hand visitors 1-0 series lead

articles.title: Bangladesh bat against Australia; Litchfield and Gardner out with injuries

articles.description: "Vaibhav Sooryavanshi has to understand a little. There will always be verbal battles against us on the pitch, because there are many countries that are jealous of us," Manoj Tiwary said.
